data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a fair distribution algorithm.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the fair distribution algorithm, which is mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how the system ensures that the same person is not always asked to cover for classes. The evidence does not include any checks or data that would confirm the implementation of this algorithm, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of a fair distribution algorithm being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fair distribution algorithm.
